title: Define the Caducus MVP PR FAQ

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting the README rewrite to capture the current public-facing product definition: overview, how it works, CLI-first MVP, architecture, and roadmap while Biblicus reinforcement memory is still being engineered.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updated README.md from a one-line placeholder into a public-facing overview covering the product purpose, why it exists, how it works, the CLI-first MVP, Caducus/Virtuus/Biblicus responsibilities, roadmap, and the outside-in repository direction.
